description: Canonical weekly reflection prompts for Know-Thyself v0.1. At the end of each week (after the anchor day in content/prompts.json) the user is invited to write a private synthesis of the week. This file defines the single Hebrew line shown above the weekly reflection textarea for Week 1 through Week 4. See README.md (Weekly Reflection) for the surrounding flow: the user re-reads their daily answers, then writes the weekly synthesis manually. The product never auto-generates a summary from the daily answers.
design_rules: Each weekly prompt is a single Hebrew line. Short enough to read at a glance, broad enough to invite synthesis.
Tone matches the daily prompts: gender-neutral, calm, non-coaching, no exclamation marks, no thanking or congratulating.
The weekly prompt invites synthesis across the week, not a new self-disclosure. It points back at what was already written.
Weekly prompts are paired with the anchor days in content/prompts.json (days 7, 14, 21, 28) so the rhythm is consistent.
Week 1 is light: the user is still building trust with the practice. Week 4 is deeper: the user has earned the right to a harder synthesis.
The prompt never implies the user must find a lesson, a pattern, or a 'next step'. Noticing is enough.

weeks.text_he: במבט אחורה על השבוע: מה חוזר?
weeks.note: Week 1 synthesis. Light, observational. Pairs with day 7 ('איזה דפוס חוזר אצלך?') so the week ends on the same question the day began with, after seven days of evidence.

weeks.text_he: מה הופיע השבוע שלא ציפית לו?
weeks.note: Week 2 synthesis. Invites the user to name a surprise without judging it. Pairs with day 14 ('מה נותן לך תחושת משמעות גם בלי הכרה?'): the daily prompt anchors meaning, the weekly prompt notices the unexpected.

Week 3 synthesis. Three weeks in, a 'what shifted' question becomes honest. Pairs with day 21 ('מה ידוע לך על עצמך היום שלא היה ידוע לפני שנה?'): yearly horizon on the day, monthly horizon on the week.

weeks.text_he: מה ראית בעצמך החודש שעוד לא נאמר במפורש?
weeks.note: Week 4 synthesis. End of the descent week. The user has shown up 28 times; the prompt earns the right to name something explicitly. Pairs with day 28 ('מה חשוב לך לשמור בשליטה עכשיו?').
